headline: Is Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) a High-Quality Compounder?
summary: Riverwater Partners, an investment management company, released its “Sustainable Value Strategy” Q1 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. In Q1 2026, the Riverwater Sustainable Value Strategy underperformed the Russell 2500 Value Index. The underperformance was driven entirely by stock selection, while sector allocation contributed positively. The quarter demonstrated a […]
